creator: alexey@renatasystems.org
text:
libidn broken after last update: cannot install: Unknown component gnometarget.

How-To-Repeat: 	
# cd /usr/ports/dns/libidn && make
===>  libidn-1.22 cannot install: Unknown component gnometarget.
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/dns/libidn.

# ident Makefile
Makefile:
     $FreeBSD: ports/dns/libidn/Makefile,v 1.82 2011/07/11 12:44:42 jlaffaye Exp $
